features: A FRAGRANT EXPERIENCE: Enjoy a fragrant, nourishing experience each time you step into the shower with Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Shower Cream.

WITH VITAMIN E: Our shower cream, with an indulgent natural honey scent surrounded by delicate jasmine in a vanilla and tonka bean base, is enriched with vitamin E to leave your skin feeling soft and nourished.

NATURAL ORIGIN INGREDIENTS: Not only does our vitamin E body wash contain plant-based milk, but it‚Äôs also made with ingredients of 95% natural origin*. (*Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing.)
98% BIODEGRADABLE FORMULA: Being thoughtful, our shower cream has a new and improved** 98% biodegradable formula and comes in a bottle that you can recycle. (**Increased biodegradability to 98%.)
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Our vitamin E body wash has also been dermatologically tested.
description: Product Description The Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey 4x750ml Shower Gel Cream, enriched with Vitamin E, leaves your skin feeling soft and nourished. The beautifully fragrant body wash is inspired by nature to delight your senses. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Glycol Distearate, Parfum, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glyceryl Oleate, Glyceryl Stearate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Mel, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Seed Extract, Tocopherol Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
